step_rationale: Complement membrane-attack complex; direct inflammation marker elevated in AMI.
mechanism: C5b-9 amplifies endothelial injury and inflammatory cell recruitment through complement-driven lysis and activation.

references.title: DSCAML1+ extracellular vesicles revealed by single-vesicle proteomics as a novel biomarker and therapeutic target in myocardial infarction.
Multiplex quantitative imaging of human myocardial infarction by mass spectrometry-immunohistochemistry.
